query:
WITH active_products AS (
  SELECT id, productCode, poNumber, vendorName, batchNo, serialNumber, imei,
         CASE WHEN poNumber IS NULL OR poNumber = '' THEN 'without_po' ELSE 'with_po' END AS sourceType
  FROM products
  WHERE archivedAt IS NULL
), duplicate_keys AS (
  SELECT 'serialNumber' AS duplicateType, serialNumber AS duplicateValue
  FROM active_products
  WHERE serialNumber IS NOT NULL AND serialNumber <> ''
  GROUP BY serialNumber
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'imei' AS duplicateType, imei AS duplicateValue
  FROM active_products
  WHERE imei IS NOT NULL AND imei <> ''
  GROUP BY imei
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT k.duplicateType,
       COUNT(*) AS duplicateGroups,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p.sourceType = 'without_po' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS duplicateRowsWithoutPo,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p.sourceType = 'with_po' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS duplicateRowsWithPo
FROM duplicate_keys k
JOIN active_products p
  ON (k.duplicateType = 'serialNumber' AND p.serialNumber = k.duplicateValue)
  OR (k.duplicateType = 'imei' AND p.imei = k.duplicateValue)
GROUP BY k.duplicateType
ORDER BY k.duplicateType;

SELECT k.duplicateType,

GROUP BY k.duplicateType
ORDER BY k.duplicateType;
